project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game app with Zustand state management
verification_instructions: Run npm run build and confirm no TypeScript errors
environment_constraints: node_modules already present, no test runner available
key_patterns: Icons defined as SVG React components in Icons.tsx with size/color/className props. Card effect text uses {token}N patterns (e.g. {vp}3) parsed by renderCardEffect.tsx. i18n has en.ts and es.ts with card effect strings.
directory_structure: src/components/ (React components), src/utils/ (utilities like renderCardEffect), src/i18n/ (en.ts, es.ts translations), src/types/ (TypeScript types)
